mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive return frequency drops below 55% when FEDFUNDS is below 3.0%.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 4.0%, labor market deterioration signals impending recessionary pressure, causing investors to price in lower corporate earnings and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 60% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 4.0%, or the t-statistic for return difference is insignificant with p greater than 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous monthly declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate a synchronized collapse in consumer and housing demand, forcing equity valuations lower and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint decline signal yields a positive return frequency above 50% or the interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant with p greater than 0.05 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during an economic expansion reflects strengthening supply-side capacity utilization, which reinforces short-term equity momentum and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 during mid-cycle expansions or produces negative returns in more than 55% of rising INDPRO observations within this regime.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 300, inflationary pressures force expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity multiples and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Returns are positive in more than 65% of observations above the threshold, or the inflation threshold shows no statistical edge over a baseline model in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in nonfarm payrolls signals robust labor demand and rising household income, supporting corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 across rolling 3-year windows or positive return frequency drops below 52% during payroll expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly GDP expansion and monthly retail sales growth confirm synchronized demand strength, reducing recession probabilities and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction effect yields a negative return frequency above 55% or the joint signal fails to outperform individual series in out-of-sample backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a contractionary phase signals weakening manufacturing output and rising default risks, triggering risk-off flows and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal generates positive returns in more than 60% of contractionary periods or loses statistical significance with p greater than 0.05 when filtered for contraction regimes.
